constraints: Approval queue records must remain no-effect read-model evidence.
Approval queue records must bind to the checked-in approval review packet by source path, schema path, review identity, review state, and newline-stable SHA-256 digest.
Approval queue records must not serialize the approval review packet payload, private connector payloads, message bodies, secrets, or credentials.
Approval enqueue remains a queue projection only; approval decisions do not execute external sends, connector mutation, memory writes, deployment mutation, or system-of-record writes.
non_goals: Do not enqueue approval records from review packets automatically.
Do not approve, reject, revise, or execute a live action.
Do not call Gmail, Calendar, task, messaging, browser, or memory connectors.
Do not grant live connector, memory, deployment, customer-readiness, or production-readiness authority.
problem_statement: Personal Assistant approval queue records validated embedded approval packets and receipts, but did not prove which no-effect approval review packet preceded the queue projection.
success_criteria: Approval queue schema requires a review_packet_ref on every record and workflow item.
The checked-in approval queue fixture validates with digest-only refs to the approval review packet.
Runtime-generated approval queue read models emit the same digest-only review packet reference.
Validator rejects review packet digest drift, payload digest flag drift, execution flag drift, and workflow-to-record reference drift.
No-effect approval, connector, external send, memory, deployment, and system-of-record boundaries remain false.
